policies.outbound:
<set-variable name="responseBodyText" value="@{
            return context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
        }" />
		
		
		
		<set-variable name="parsedResponseString" value="@{
            var parsedResponse = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("parsedResponse");
            return parsedResponse != null ? parsedResponse.ToString() : string.Empty;
        }" />
		
		
			{{ContainerAppUrl}}/api/log
			POST
			
				application/json
			
			
				@("Bearer " + (string)context.Variables["msi-access-token"])
			
			@{
				var requestBody = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestBody");
				var parsedResponseString = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("parsedResponseString");
				var tenantId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("tenantId");
				var clientAppId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("clientAppId");
				var audience = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("audience");
				var deploymentId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("deploymentId");
				return $"{{\"tenantId\": \"{tenantId}\", \"clientAppId\": \"{clientAppId}\", \"audience\": \"{audience}\", \"requestBody\": {requestBody}, \"responseBody\": {parsedResponseString}, \"deploymentId\": \"{deploymentId}\"}}";
			}
